subject: ADDENDUM: Still-missing cities after latest Booker load
body:
Harvey,

Updated city coverage check after today's Booker 88-event load. Some wins, but the gap list is still long. Adding this to yesterday's research request.

## WINS from latest load
- Houston: 0 -> 6 (was a flagged gap)
- Nashville: missing -> 2 (just landed)
- Memphis (Bartlett): now on the board
- New international cities reached via Booker: Hamburg, Marseille, Manchester, Lyon, Krakow, Santiago, Taipei

## US — STILL MISSING ENTIRELY

**Big metros, zero events:**
- Cleveland OH, Cincinnati OH, Columbus OH
- Kansas City MO
- Las Vegas NV, Reno NV
- Dallas/Fort Worth TX (you noted unreachable), San Antonio TX, El Paso TX
- Honolulu HI, Anchorage AK
- Buffalo / Rochester NY
- Louisville KY, Oklahoma City OK, Omaha NE, Des Moines IA
- Spokane WA, Boise ID

## US — CRITICALLY THIN (have feeds but undercount real scenes)

- Los Angeles: 65 (should be 200+)
- Chicago: 41 (should be 100+)
- San Diego: 6, Atlanta: 4, Pittsburgh: 3 (you added feed)
- Denver: 2 (you added feed — more incoming?)
- Tampa, St. Louis, Indianapolis, Charlotte, Hartford, Little Rock, Asheville: 1 each

## WORLD — STILL MISSING

**TANGO HEARTLAND (CRITICAL):**
- Buenos Aires: only 3 events!! (should be 1000+ — biggest single gap in the DB)
- Montevideo UY (tango co-capital, MISSING)
- Rosario, Cordoba, La Plata AR

**Europe major hubs missing:**
- Berlin DE (was 2, now missing??)
- Amsterdam NL, Vienna AT, Prague CZ, Budapest HU, Istanbul TR
- Rome IT, Milan IT, Florence IT, Bologna IT, Naples IT
- Athens GR
- Brussels BE, Copenhagen DK, Helsinki FI, Oslo NO
- Zurich/Geneva CH
- Frankfurt/Cologne/Stuttgart DE
- Dublin IE, Edinburgh UK, Toulouse/Bordeaux FR
- Bucharest, Sofia, Belgrade, Zagreb, Ljubljana, Riga, Tallinn

**Latin America missing (huge gap):**
- Mexico City MX, Guadalajara MX
- Sao Paulo BR, Rio BR, Curitiba BR
- Bogota CO, Medellin CO
- Lima PE, Santiago CL (just got 1), Quito EC
- Caracas VE, La Paz BO

**Asia missing/thin:**
- Tokyo: 3 (should be 50+)
- Seoul KR, Hong Kong HK, Beijing CN, Bangkok TH, Manila PH
- Jakarta ID, Kuala Lumpur MY, Mumbai/Delhi IN

**Oceania missing:**
- Auckland NZ, Wellington NZ
- Adelaide AU, Canberra AU, Hobart AU

**Middle East/Africa missing:**
- Tel Aviv IL, Dubai AE
- Cape Town ZA, Johannesburg ZA, Cairo EG, Nairobi KE

**Canada thin:**
- Toronto 3, Montreal 1, Vancouver 2 (should be 50+ each)
- Ottawa, Calgary, Edmonton: missing

## Saddest headline

**Buenos Aires has 3 events.** Literal tango capital. This single gap dwarfs everything else.

## Suggested priority order

1. Buenos Aires (Hoy-Milonga.com is the canonical source — they aggregate every milonga in BA every day)
2. Berlin / Paris / London (figure out why they keep falling out of coverage)
3. Tokyo (japan tango federation)
4. Mexico City
5. LA / Chicago (biggest US undercount)
6. Montevideo / Rosario

Note: Hub is down right now, sending via Collab fallback. Reply via Collab if hub stays down.

— Porter
